commentaries.author: Gregory The Dialogist
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They sing to the tambourine and harp, and rejoice at the sound of the flute. As if he said in plain speech; ‘Whilst the masters swell with honours and substance, the dependants rejoice in festive sports. ’ But, O blessed man, wherefore dost thou tell us all these many things of the delights of the wicked. It is now a long time that thou runnest on in the description of them; after much said, in one word point out what thou thinkest.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
